response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a highly experienced Staff/Senior Software Engineer with nearly 20 years of professional development across web, mobile, embedded, and AI infrastructure — far exceeding the entry-level scope of this role. While his technical breadth (Java, OOP, agile, AWS) satisfies the hard skill requirements on paper, the fundamental mismatch in seniority makes him unsuitable for a Junior position. More critically, the role explicitly requires strong German communication, and the candidate lists German as only 'Basic,' which is a disqualifying gap for a client-facing digitalization role in Germany.
strengths: Deep OOP and polyglot programming background including Java, TypeScript, and C++, covering the core technical requirement
Demonstrated agile practices — TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and pairing — across multiple roles
Cloud experience with AWS CDK and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes) aligns with the desired cloud technologies
concerns: Massively overqualified: Staff/Senior-level engineer with ~20 years of experience applying for an entry-level role raises serious retention and motivation red flags
German is listed as 'Basic,' directly conflicting with the explicit requirement for strong verbal and written German for client-facing work in Germany
Primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js, not Java — Java appears only as a secondary language from older roles, not a current focus
